import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn get_or_zero(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(text)

  mut starts: List<Int> = []
  mut lens: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws(text, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      let st = i
      while i < n and not is_ws(text, i)
        i = i + 1
      end
      starts = list.push(starts, st)
      lens = list.push(lens, i - st)
    end
  end

  let count = starts.len()
  mut best_start = 0
  mut best_len = 0
  mut best_count = 0

  mut k = 0
  while k < count
    let sk = get_or_zero(starts, k)
    let lk = get_or_zero(lens, k)
    let tk = string.substring(text, sk, sk + lk)

    mut is_first = true
    mut j = 0
    while j < k
      let sj = get_or_zero(starts, j)
      let lj = get_or_zero(lens, j)
      if lj == lk
        let tj = string.substring(text, sj, sj + lj)
        if tj == tk
          is_first = false
        end
      end
      j = j + 1
    end

    if is_first
      mut c = 0
      mut m = k
      while m < count
        let sm = get_or_zero(starts, m)
        let lm = get_or_zero(lens, m)
        if lm == lk
          let tm = string.substring(text, sm, sm + lm)
          if tm == tk
            c = c + 1
          end
        end
        m = m + 1
      end
      if c > best_count
        best_count = c
        best_start = sk
        best_len = lk
      end
    end
    k = k + 1
  end

  let top = string.substring(text, best_start, best_start + best_len)
  println("top=#{top}=#{best_count}")
end
